title: MTT Log-Det Estimator for Coulomb Free Energy
description: Implement stochastic log-det estimator on Coulomb-weighted graph Laplacian. Uses Hutchinson probing + Lanczos/Chebyshev polynomial approximation. O(N*K*M) cost.
milestone: Demo on 256-atom water box, <5% error vs dense Laplacian eigendecomposition
